case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF S.F. TAX COLLECTOR VS LOPEZ, SERGIO et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,420.00 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF S.F. TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, SERGIO PARDILLO, MARIA LOPEZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-18-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
